channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Can this manhole cover pothole be marked up outside Andorra Ct please?, 1st March
item.description:
Please inspect and mark this up for Riney?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Nw67hy, 1st March
item.description:
Road is damage and not any road sing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5, Quex Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 1st March
item.description:
Recently resurfaced potholes have been damaged and need repair

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lonsdale Drive, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 30+ bags of rubbish left behind 70 pier road building, 1st March
item.description:
There has been 30+ bags of rubbish dumped in the car park space behind 70 pier Road, DA8 1BA. This rubbish has been since before Christmas and people seem to be adding more every week. Please can you clear this as a matter of urgency. There is a huge rat problem down there also.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): James Watt Way, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated dog mess on this street, 1st March
item.description:
Large amounts of dog droppings have been left on this street, particularly in this corner. This has increased recently thanks to two individuals I’ve seen repeatedly not pick up after their dogs.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33,35, Cunard Walk, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burst watermain, 1st March
item.description:
Roads breaking up and water on road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 469, Norwood Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping child's bouncer, 1st March
item.description:
Large child's bouncer/toy left by the fence at the top of Parkview Road. Been there since evening 1/3

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwood Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rental bike, 1st March
item.description:
There is a rental bike on the pavement which has been there for five days which is causing an obstruction to pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 1st March
item.description:
There are cans, plastic bottles, food packaging and plastic bags on the pavement and road. It has been there are four days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Canterbury Road is filthy! Needs sweeping, 1st March
item.description:
Canterbury Road is filthy! Needs sweeping

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Canterbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 1st March
item.description:
Pot holes all the way up bounces road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bounces Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Missing street light, 1st March
item.description:
The lamppost was knocked down during an RTA 6months ago. It was removed and has not been replaced. The street is very dark and the adjacent bus stop feels dangerous to wait at after dark.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burnt Ash Lane, Sundridge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, 1st March
item.description:
Loads of potholes all the way up Victoria Road from park lane all the way up to church street
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Sofa-bed, 1st March
item.description:
This sofa bed was abandoned by 3 men on Saturday 28/02/2026 around 11.55-58 pm. The house at the corner probably has them on camera. They lied when confronted and went back home which was in the direction of Basildon Road. I would bet one of them at least doesn’t live far.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Howarth Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Could pavement around tree pit be inspected please?, 1st March
item.description:
Could this pavement be checked out please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 95, Hayes Lane, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole, 1st March
item.description:
Large pothole which needs filling

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nightingale Place, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes on the cycle lane, 1st March
item.description:
There are multiple potholes in the cycle lane. To avoid them i had to swerve onto the road, just as it curves and very nearly got hit by a car.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In bus stop outside Inverforth House (same side of road), 1st March
item.description:
Pothole or pothole cluster
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): North End Way, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large fallen branch obstructing path, 1st March
item.description:
This has been here for several weeks and it's not convenient for the many families with prams. Thanks in advance for removing it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Royston Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Station Rise SE27 9BW outside number 12 (Xquisite, 1st March
item.description:
Station Rise SE27 9BW outside number 12 (Xquisite restaurant) is a Lambeth pink powder coated painted metal cycle parking ‘rail’ has been graffiti tagged – Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7A, Station Rise, Tulse Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
